notes:
v1.2.10 Update
🐛 Sequence Editor Selection and Delete Protection: Opening the Sequence or Exploration Editor now clears the node graph selection, and node deletion asks for confirmation before removing it.

announcement.title: 🌸 Visual Novel Maker v1.2.10
announcement.content:
Visual Novel Maker v1.2.10 improves editor safety while working on interaction nodes.

  • Opening the Sequence or Exploration Editor clears the graph selection behind it.
  • Deleting a node now asks for confirmation before removal.
